title: 10 best herbal essential oils for knee swelling
description: Tasmanian blue gum essential oils helps with knee swelling because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which effectively reduce pain and stiffness associated with joint inflammation. The oil's active compounds, including eucalyptol and terpinen-4-ol, have been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines, thereby alleviating swollen joints and promoting relaxation.
